E

effectiveMaxBin - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.HistogramPanel
 
effectiveMaxBin - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
 
enableOrResetUIComponents(boolean, boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Enables, or disables, UI components (inputs) of this preprocessing panel.
If it disables, inputs can be reseted to their default value.
enablePanels(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanel
Either :
enableSliders(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Enables or disables all four threshold slider and spinner controls simultaneously.
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.LeftPanelSubPanel
Enables, or disables, UI components of the sub-panel.
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.FooterLeftPanel
Enables, or disables, UI components (navigation buttons) of this footer panel.
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
 
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
Enables or disables all interactive UI components of this panel.
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Enables or disables all interactive UI components of this panel without resetting their values.
enableUIComponents(boolean) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ThresholdingPanel
Enables or disables all interactive UI components of this panel.
enhanceCheckbox - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Checkbox to enable or disable contrast enhancement.
enhanceContrast - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.AnalysisSettings
 
enhanceContrast() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Try to apply contrast enhancement to the current image using ImageJ's ContrastEnhancer.
enhanceContrast(ImageProcessor) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Enhances contrast for the given ImageProcessor.
enhanceContrast(ImageProcessor) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
enhanceContrast(ImageProcessor, boolean, double) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.leftpanel.PreprocessingManager
Enhances contrast for the given ImageProcessor using ImageJ's ContrastEnhancer.
enhanceContrastEnabled() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.AnalysisSettings
 
enhanceContrastEnabled() - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
 
enhanceContrastEnabled() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCServiceImpl
 
enhanceSaturatedPercent - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.AnalysisSettings
 
enhanceSaturatedResetButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Button to reset the saturation percentage to its default value.
enhanceSaturatedSpinner - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.PreprocessingPanel
Spinner to set the saturation percentage for contrast enhancement.
enterCircularityThresholdSpinner() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Update the circularity threshold with the value of the circularity threshold spinner.
enterManualCalibrationSpinner() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Updates the Calibration in the AnalysisSettings when the user changes the pixel size.
enterMaxCircularityField() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Validates the input of the maximum circularity text field and updates the corresponding setting, when ENTER is pressed on the input.
If the minimum field is invalid, resets it to its last valid value.
enterMaxSizeField() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Validates the input of the maximum size text field and updates the corresponding setting, when ENTER is pressed on the input.
If the minimum field is invalid, resets it to its last valid value.
enterMinCircularityField() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Validates the input of the minimum circularity text field and updates the corresponding setting, when ENTER is pressed on the input.
If the maximum field is invalid, resets it to its last valid value.
enterMinSizeField() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
Validates the input of the minimum size text field and updates the corresponding setting, when ENTER is pressed on the input.
If the maximum field is invalid, resets it to its last valid value.
erosion - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.AnalysisSettings
 
erosionEnabled() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.AnalysisSettings
 
erosionRadio - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.MorphologyPanel
 
eventService - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.rightpanel.RightPanel
 
excludeOnEdgesCheckbox - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ParticleAnalysisParamsPanel
 
exportParametersAction() - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
Open a JFileChooser for selecting the save path and exporting current analysis parameters to JSON.
exportParametersButton - Variable in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.ui.leftpanel.subpanels.ImageSourcePanel
 
exportResultsTable(ResultsTable, String) - Method in interface fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.LDCService
Export as a CSV file the table passed in parameter.

exportResultsTable(ResultsTable, String) - Method in class fr.sorbonne_universite.ldc.model.rightpanel.MeasurementsManager
Export as a CSV file the table passed in parameter.
